name: python3-py-sneakers
title: python3-py-sneakers
summary: Port of the libnms C library (Python 3)
description:
Port of the libnms C library (Python 3)
This package contains a port to Python of the libnms C library. It recreates
the famous data decryption effect shown in the 1992 film Sneakers.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for py-sneakers.
